entries.name: DRSE State Transition
entries.rationale: Core V1700 state semantics should be constitution-level authority.

entries.name: NarrativeStateTensor 8D/10D
entries.rationale: Tensor candidates inform state contracts but should not become runtime authority in Page01.

entries.name: Temporal Decay
entries.rationale: Memory drift logic is accepted for V1700 but starts in the memory body.

entries.name: BM25 / RRF Retrieval
entries.rationale: Cross-memory query semantics are approved for later read-only retrieval.

entries.name: Fourier Narrative Tension Curve
entries.rationale: Useful for benchmark scoring after generation exists.

entries.name: Narrative Fitness Score
entries.rationale: Adopted as a future benchmark axis instead of immediate runtime logic.

entries.name: AMW Emotional Momentum
entries.rationale: Relevant for style drift checks after benchmark governance exists.

entries.name: LoRA Promotion Policy
entries.rationale: Training and promotion stay disabled until the learning body is gated.

entries.name: ASD Repair Pipeline
entries.rationale: Repair remains proposal-only until human approval gates exist.

entries.name: MultiWork Shared World
entries.rationale: Shared-world absorption is deferred beyond the constitution page.
